description: Composition:Sky blue round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitHoard good karma for a life full of beautiful wonders. Do it with zest in this energetic sky blue t-shirt from tantra. Team this with denims or cargoes as you enjoy being good and doing good.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-32", Waist-26"
